items.html: Thus, in the first Ibur [conception], which is to bring forth the six ends of ZA [Zeir Anpin], the essence of the Zivug [coupling] was from AA [Arich Anpin] himself, and the Zivug of Aba and Ima was secondary to it — as was said, ZA being within Aba and Ima in this first Ibur. But in the second Ibur, of the Mochin, the Zivug of Aba and Ima was then the essential one, to extend Mochin to them — except that it was through the clothing of Arich within them, as is known, for he is always clothed in them.
